title: tanacetum tauricum
intro: Tanacetum tauricum, also known as Tatarian chrysanthemum, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Tanacetum tauricum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
